title: Shivayogi Sri Puttayyajja
desc: Puttaraj, a visually impaired child, grows up poor and passionate about classical music. Soon, he becomes a renowned vocalist and multi-instrumentalist and wins many accolades making the nation proud.

title: Hostel Hudugaru Bekagiddare
desc: A group of students who are suspects of a boy's hostel warden's death, make a plan to hide his corpse after they find a note left by him.

title: 2016 Reporter Robinhood Reporting
desc: As the lives of several people are disrupted, two minor journalists strive to find their big break amidst a country-wide demonetisation.

title: Officer On Duty
desc: A demoted cop looks into fake jewelry criminals, getting caught up in a risky world of bad guys, putting his life in danger as he tries to solve the case.

title: Devil's Double Next Level
desc: A brutally honest film critic is invited to an exclusive preview of a horror-laced movie by an enigmatic filmmaker. However, events take a surreal turn when he finds himself trapped inside the film.

title: Raju Kannada Medium
desc: Raju, a village boy, travels to Bengaluru in search of a better job. Along the way, he faces numerous challenges that teach him valuable life lessons.
